prompt: {"type": "live stream interface mockup", "layout": {"main_feed": {"content": "video game scene, cowboy silhouette looking at a grave with a celtic cross at sunset", "subtitle": "{argument name=\"game subtitle\" default=\"Arthur I gave you all I had.\"}", "ui_elements": ["circular minimap in bottom left"]}, "webcam": {"position": "top left", "subject": "{argument name=\"webcam subject\" default=\"Sam Altman\"} looking intently and slightly sad", "background": "room with a plant and a glowing lamp"}, "stream_info": {"position": "bottom", "profile": {"name": "{argument name=\"streamer name\" default=\"SamAltman\"}", "verified": true, "avatar": "grayscale portrait of the streamer", "live_badge": "LIVE"}, "details": {"title": "{argument name=\"stream title\" default=\"first playthrough of RDR2 (no spoilers please!)\"}", "category": "{argument name=\"game title\" default=\"Red Dead Redemption 2\"}", "tags": ["English", "AMA", "OpenAI", "CEO", "Artificial Intelligence"]}, "stats": {"viewers": "141,572", "uptime": "3:42:17"}, "buttons": ["Follow", "Subscribe"]}, "chat_sidebar": {"position": "right", "header": "STREAM CHAT", "messages_count": 17, "message_examples": ["spaghetti_code: don't cry", "nicodemus88: we're all gonna make it", "quantumlance: peak fiction", "souljaboytellem: LUMBAGO", "m4xw311: ride high cowboy"], "input_area": "Send a message box with a purple Chat button"}}}
translatedPrompt: {"type": "直播界面模型", "layout": {"main_feed": {"content": "电子游戏场景，牛仔剪影在日落时分凝视着带有凯尔特十字架的墓碑", "subtitle": "{argument name=\"game subtitle\" default=\"Arthur I gave you all I had.\"}", "ui_elements": ["左下角的圆形小地图"]}, "webcam": {"position": "左上角", "subject": "{argument name=\"webcam subject\" default=\"Sam Altman\"} 神情专注且略显忧伤", "background": "带有植物和发光台灯的房间"}, "stream_info": {"position": "底部", "profile": {"name": "{argument name=\"streamer name\" default=\"SamAltman\"}", "verified": true, "avatar": "主播的灰度肖像", "live_badge": "直播中"}, "details": {"title": "{argument name=\"stream title\" default=\"first playthrough of RDR2 (no spoilers please!)\"}", "category": "{argument name=\"game title\" default=\"Red Dead Redemption 2\"}", "tags": ["英语", "AMA", "OpenAI", "CEO", "人工智能"]}, "stats": {"viewers": "141,572", "uptime": "3:42:17"}, "buttons": ["关注", "订阅"]}, "chat_sidebar": {"position": "右侧", "header": "直播聊天", "messages_count": 17, "message_examples": ["spaghetti_code: 别哭", "nicodemus88: 我们都会成功的", "quantumlance: 巅峰之作", "souljaboytellem: 腰痛 (LUMBAGO)", "m4xw311: 骑行高地，牛仔"], "input_area": "带有紫色“发送”按钮的消息输入框"}}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 直播界面模型：生成一个逼真的直播平台界面，包含游戏画面、摄像头叠加层、直播详情以及活跃的聊天侧边栏。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
